debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n

⊢ Real.log x ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (↑k)⁻¹

              have := (le_trans (by
                have := le_of_eq (by simp)
                exact this) (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_eq rfl) (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_eq rfl) (by linarith)))))
              exact le_of_lt (by linarith))
          have hxle : x - 1 ≤ (n : ℝ) - 1 := by linarith
          exact le_trans hxle this
        exact le_trans hxlog hxharm
      _  ≤ primeCountingReal x + 1 := by sorry

have hx1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n)))
          exact le_trans this hxge
        have hx0 : (0 : ℝ) < x := lt_of_lt_of_le zero_lt_one hx1
        have hxle : x ≤ (n + 1 : ℝ) := le_of_lt hxlt
        calc
          Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := Real.log_le_log (by linarith) hxle
          _ ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            simpa using (Real.log_le_sum_inv_Icc (n := n))

have hx : 1 ≤ x := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n)))
          exact le_trans this (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) hxge))
        have hx0 : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hx
        have hxn : x ≤ n + 1 := le_of_lt hxlt
        have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < n + 1 := by nlinarith
        have : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
          exact Real.log_le_log (le_of_lt hx0) hxn
        have : Real.log x ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ + 1 := by
          have hlog : Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ + 1 := by
            simpa using Real.log_le_sum_nat_inv_Icc_add_one n
          exact le_trans this (by simpa [add_assoc] using hlog)
        linarith

have : x ≤ Real.exp (∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹) := by
          have hx0 : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
            have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) + 1 := by
              exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (le_of_lt (by linarith))
            linarith) (le_trans (by linarith) (le_of_lt hxlt))
          have hx1 : 1 ≤ x := by
            have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le n)
            have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by
              cases n with
              | zero => simpa using hx0.le
              | succ n =>
                have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (Nat.succ n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n))
                exact this
            exact le_trans this hxge
          have hxexp : x ≤ Real.exp (Real.log (n + 1)) := by
            have : x ≤ (n : ℝ) + 1 := le_of_lt hxlt
            simpa [Real.exp_log (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) + 1)] using
              (Real.exp_monotone (show Real.log x ≤ Real.log ((n : ℝ) + 1) from
                Real.log_le_log (by linarith) (by linarith))).trans_eq
          have : Real.log ((n : ℝ) + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            simpa using (Real.log_le_sum_inv_Icc (n := n))
          have := (Real.exp_monotone this)
          have : Real.exp (Real.log ((n : ℝ) + 1)) ≤ Real.exp (∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹) := this
          have : (n : ℝ) + 1 ≤ Real.exp (∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹) := by
            simpa [Real.exp_log (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) + 1)] using this
          exact le_trans (le_of_lt hxlt) this
        have hxpos : 0 < x := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) + 1 := by linarith
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (le_trans (by linarith) (le_of_lt hxlt))
        exact (Real.log_le_iff_le_exp hxpos).2 this
      _ := by sorry

have : Real.log x ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          simpa using (le_of_lt (Real.log_lt_sum_Icc_inv hxge hxlt))
        exact this

have hx : x ≤ (n + 1 : ℕ) := by
          exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt hxlt)
        have hx1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
          by_cases hn : n = 0
          · subst hn
            have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ x := by exact le_trans (by norm_num) hxge
            exact le_trans (by norm_num) this
          · have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
            exact le_trans hn1 hxge
        have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hx1
        have hxle : x ≤ (n + 1 : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hx
        have hlog : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1 : ℝ) := by
          exact Real.log_le_log (by exact le_trans (by norm_num) hx1) hxle
        have hharm : Real.log (n + 1 : ℝ) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          simpa using (Real.log_nat_succ_le_sum_Icc_inv n)
        exact le_trans hlog hharm

have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
          exact this) (le_trans (by
            have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by
              exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n)))
            exact le_trans this hxge) (le_of_lt hxlt))
        have hxle : x ≤ (n + 1 : ℝ) := le_of_lt hxlt
        have : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1 : ℝ) := by
          exact Real.log_le_log (le_of_lt hxpos) hxle
        have : Real.log x ≤ (∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹) := by
          exact le_trans this (by
            simpa using (Real.log_le_sum_inv_Icc (n := n)))
        exact this

have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < (1 : ℝ) := by norm_num
          exact this) (le_trans (by
            have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by
              cases n with
              | zero =>
                simp at hxge
                linarith
              | succ n =>
                exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n))
            exact le_trans this hxge) (le_of_lt hxlt))
        have hxle : x ≤ n + 1 := le_of_lt hxlt
        have hxn : x ≤ n := by
          have : x < n + 1 := hxlt
          have hx_floor : (⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) ≤ x := by exact Nat.floor_le hxpos.le
          have hn_floor : (⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) < n + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt hx_floor this
          have : ⌊x⌋₊ ≤ n := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (by
              simpa [Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one] using hn_floor))
          exact le_trans (by
            have : x ≤ (⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) + 1 := by
              exact (Nat.lt_floor_add_one x).le
            linarith) (by
              have : (⌊x⌋₊ : ℝ) + 1 ≤ n + 1 := by
                exact add_le_add_right (by exact_mod_cast this) 1
              linarith)
        have h : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
          exact Real.log_le_log (le_of_lt hxpos) (by linarith)
        have : Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          simpa using Real.log_nat_succ_le_sum_inv_Icc (n := n)
        exact le_trans h this
      _ := by sorry

by_cases hn : n = 0
        · subst hn
          have hx : x ≤ 0 := by
            have : (x : ℝ) < 1 := by simpa using hxlt
            linarith
          simp [Icc, hx, Real.log_nonpos]
        ·
          have hnx : (1 : ℝ) ≤ x := by
            have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ n := by
              have : (1 : ℕ) ≤ n := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)
              exact_mod_cast this
            linarith
          have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hnx
          have hxle : x ≤ n + 1 := le_of_lt hxlt
          have hlogle : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
            exact Real.log_le_log (le_trans (by linarith) (le_of_lt hxpos)) hxle
          have hsum : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            refine sum_nonneg ?_
            intro k hk
            have hk1 : (1 : ℕ) ≤ k := (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
            have hkpos : (0 : ℝ) < (k : ℝ) := by
              have : (0 : ℕ) < k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
                intro hk0
                subst hk0
                exact Nat.not_succ_le_zero 0 (by simpa using hk1))
              exact_mod_cast this
            have : 0 < (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := inv_pos.mpr hkpos
            linarith
          have : Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
            linarith
          linarith

have hx_le : x ≤ (n + 1 : ℝ) := by linarith
        have hn : (n : ℝ) ≤ n + 1 := by linarith
        have hxpos : 0 < x := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) < n + 1 := by nlinarith
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this hx_le
        have hx1 : 1 ≤ x := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ n := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le n)))
          exact le_trans this hxge
        have hxlog : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) :=
          Real.log_le_log (by linarith) hx_le
        have hharm : Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          simpa using Real.log_le_sum_Icc_inv (n := n)
        exact le_trans hxlog hharm

have : Real.log x ≤ Real.log (n + 1) := by
          have hxpos : 0 < x := lt_of_lt_of_le (by
            have : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) + 1 := by nlinarith
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hxlt)) (le_of_lt hxlt)
          exact Real.log_le_log (le_of_lt hxpos) (le_of_lt hxlt)
        have hn1 : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) + 1 := by
          have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le n)
          linarith
        have hn1' : 0 < (n : ℝ) + 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) hn1
        have hlog : Real.log (n + 1) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Icc 1 n, (k : ℝ)⁻¹ := by
          simpa using (Real.log_le_sum_inv_Icc (n := n))
        exact this.trans hlog
      := by sorry
